results.title: Los protagonistas de la final: Messi, cara a cara con el heredero de su legado
results.description: Lionel Messi se verá en la final del Mundial con Lamine Yamal, quien está liderando el recambio generacional en Barcelona.

results.title: How Nike is ‘preserving’ football legends in time with new collection they call the ‘future of soccer on the streets’
results.description: NIKE isn't letting football history die. In fact, the brand is reviving multiple iconic boots for a re-release as special streetwear items. On June 3, Nike displayed its newest shoe in New York City alongside a collection of World Cup-inspired clothing. On a table sat multiple pairs of Mercurial R9s, the iconic boot that Ronaldo...
